description: Customer asks where their Klarna refund is. Agent must NOT promise a settlement date — the Klarna merchant API does not expose this. Must mention the registration date and frame settlement timing as a range.

conversation.content: Jag returnerade en t-shirt från order #1002 (erik@example.se) men har inte fått pengarna ännu. När kommer återbetalningen?

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in Swedish. States that a refund of 599 SEK was registered with Klarna on 2026-05-10 (the registration date) for the returned t-shirt. CRITICAL: does NOT promise a specific date when the money will arrive in the customer's account. Frames settlement timing as a range (typically 3–5 business days) or notes that bank/card settlement timing depends on the bank. Does NOT invent a Klarna lifecycle status the API doesn't provide. Tone is honest and clear about what the merchant can and cannot see.
